basic_details.job_title: RNU DDK Lucknow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for News Reader, Copy Editor and CG Operator Posts
basic_details.post_name: News Reader, Copy Editor and CG Operator
basic_details.short_information: RNU DDK Lucknow has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Casual Assignees Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for media jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.age_details: News Reader (Urdu): 21-40 years, Copy Editor (Urdu): 21-50 years, CG Operator (Urdu): 21-50 years
age_limit.details: News Reader (Urdu): Minimum Age - 21 Years, Maximum Age - 40 Years Copy Editor (Urdu): Minimum Age - 21 Years, Maximum Age - 50 Years CG Operator (Urdu): Minimum Age - 21 Years, Maximum Age - 50 Years

qualification.details: News Reader (Urdu): Degree from a recognized University, Proficiency in the language concerned, Camera-friendly face, with a voice of a very good quality suited to broadcasting, Correct pronunciation, accent and modulation, Knowledge of current regional/Indian and foreign affairs, Acquaintance with names of important personalities in the region/India and abroad. Preferable: Journalism background, Professional background in the field of academic or related areas, Experience with Television/Radio Media. Copy Editor (Urdu): Degree from a recognized University, Degree/ PG Diploma in Journalism/Mass Communication from a recognized Institute/University. Desirable: Acquaintance with regional/National/International affairs. Matriculate in the relevant language. 3 years experience of work relating to news in a media organisation, preferably broadcasting. CG Operator (Urdu): 10+2 from a recognised Board, Certificate in Computer Applications. Desirable: One year experience in relevant field.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1650/- per day per shift, Rs. 1500/- per day per shift, Rs.1125 per day per shift

selection_process: etc.) Scrutiny and screening/selection process Skill-test Performance reviews
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://prasarbharati.gov.in/pbvacancies.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RNU DDK Lucknow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RNU DDK Lucknow Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download RNU DDK Lucknow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: News Reader (Urdu): Degree from a recognized University, Proficiency in the language concerned, Camera-friendly face, with a voice of a very good quality suited to broadcasting, Correct pronunciation, accent and modulation, Knowledge of current regional/Indian and foreign affairs, Acquaintance with names of important personalities in the region/India and abroad. Preferable: Journalism background, Professional background in the field of academic or related areas, Experience with Television/Radio Media. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://prasarbharati.gov.in/pbvacancies. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RNU DDK Lucknow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RNU DDK Lucknow Casual Assignees posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Casual Assignees posts at RNU DDK Lucknow is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the News Reader (Urdu) post?
faq.answer: For the News Reader (Urdu) post, candidates need a Degree from a recognized University, proficiency in Urdu, a camera-friendly face, good voice quality, correct pronunciation, and knowledge of current affairs. Journalism background and media experience are preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Copy Editor (Urdu) position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Copy Editor (Urdu) position is between 21 to 50 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government rules, which can be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the RNU DDK Lucknow recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted via Speed Post, email, or hand-delivery. The application form needs to be filled carefully and sent to the specified address or email ID before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for a CG Operator (Urdu) at RNU DDK Lucknow?
faq.answer: The salary for a CG Operator (Urdu) is Rs. 1125/- per day per shift. This is a contractual role, and the payment is based on daily shifts worked.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates applying for the Casual Assignees posts at RNU DDK Lucknow.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum qualification required for the CG Operator (Urdu) post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the CG Operator (Urdu) post is 10+2 from a recognized Board along with a Certificate in Computer Applications. One year of relevant experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these casual assignee roles?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves skill tests, scrutiny, screening, and performance reviews. Specific details for each post can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by RNU DDK Lucknow, which is part of Prasar Bharati.
